title: FOSTER PROCTOR HOMES - 211info
text: OREGON YOUTH AUTHORITY FOSTER PROCTOR HOMES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF An Oregon Youth Authority (OYA) Proctor Parent provides a safe, structured home for youth (typically 12-24) in OYA's care due to legal issues. These youth often have significant behavioral or emotional challenges. Proctor parents work with OYA and agencies to help them develop skills and achieve successful independence. 530 Center Street NE Suite 500 Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: To become an Oregon Youth Authority (OYA) Proctor Parent: - Be at least 21 years old and a U.S. citizen or permanent resident - Pass a criminal background check and a home study/inspection -Complete required training -Emotionally mature -Financially stable. -Demonstrate a strong commitment to helping youth -Willingness to collaborate with OYA and other professionals Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: State of Oregon TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Corner of Center and High Streets Services: Foster Parent/Family Recruitment Other Services Offered At This Location: CRIMINAL CORRECTIONAL SYSTEM - OREGON YOUTH AUTHORITY If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OREGON YOUTH AUTHORITY
